title: • Cons: Feels disconnected from other archetypes.
content:
• Cons: Feels disconnected from other archetypes.

2️⃣ Turn It Into an Archetype That Players Can Pick From the Start
• The Fallen Angel would be a starting archetype, meaning players enter the game as a rogue figure.
• Pros: Brings it in line with the others.
• Cons: Loses the transformation element.

3️⃣ Rebrand It as a “Corrupting Influence” That Affects Any Archetype
• Instead of being a transformation or archetype, “Fallen Angel” becomes an external effect.
• If a player accumulates too many villainous actions, their archetype is permanently altered by a Fallen status.
• Pros: Allows flexibility without breaking archetype cohesion.
• Cons: Less dramatic than a full transformation.

📜 Final Decision Pending Your Input:
✔ Which version do you prefer? Should it stay a transformation, become a starting archetype, or be a corruption effect?
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 477 (chunk 477/555)
